title: `buildah rmi` removes parent images: expected behavior?
body: **Description** `buildah rmi ` appears to remove not only `` but all of its parent layers/images if the parent layers are untagged ("dangling"?). It's possible that this is the intended behavior, but it was unexpected to me and also not clearly documented, which I think is a bit confusing. **Steps to reproduce the issue:** 1. Create a parent image: `ctr=$(buildah from docker.io/library/alpine)` (some arbitrary base, doesn't matter), `parent=$(buildah commit $ctr)` 2. Create a child image: `ctr=$(buildah from $parent)`, `child=$(buildah commit $ctr)` 3. Check to see both images exist: `buildah images -a` 4. Remove child image: `buildah rmi $child` 5. Check again: `buildah images -a`--the parent ID has also disappeared! **Describe the results you received:** The parent image gets deleted along with the child image. **Describe the results you expected:** I expected that `buildah rmi` only deletes the child image, leaving the parent image present. If the reported behavior is intended/correct, then I expect the [`buildah rmi` docs](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/docs/buildah-rmi.md) to say a sentence or so clarifying the mechanics of `rmi`--namely, that it deletes the given image _as well as all dangling parent layers_ (up to the last non-dangling parent). It's worth noting that the parent doesn't get deleted if the parent image is tagged with a name, so the behavior is specific to _dangling_ parents. **Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:** (not on either of those platforms, I'm on Void, so `xbps-query -R buildah`) ``` architecture: x86_64 changelog: https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md filename-sha256: 25806183e98deae0653cf8c2faa61e61426343e5cb50fb3ca6f3088e61d2d6a3 filename-size: 13MB homepage: https://github.com/containers/buildah installed_size: 29MB license: Apache-2.0 maintainer: Cameron Nemo pkgname: buildah pkgver: buildah-1.20.1_1 repository: https://alpha.us.repo.voidlinux.org/current run_depends: runc>=0 containers.image>=0 glibc>=2.32_1 libgpgme>=1.12.0_2 libassuan>=2.0.1_1 libgpg-error>=1.6_1 device-mapper>=2.02.110_1 shlib-requires: libpthread.so.0 libgpgme.so.11 libassuan.so.0 libgpg-error.so.0 libdl.so.2 libdevmapper.so.1.02 libc.so.6 short_desc: Dockerfile compatible OCI image building tool source-revisions: buildah:b177108fa1 ``` **Output of `buildah version`:** ``` Version: 1.20.1 Go Version: go1.16.3 Image Spec: 1.0.1-dev Runtime Spec: 1.0.2-dev CNI Spec: 0.4.0 libcni Version: image Version: 5.10.5 Git Commit: Built: Wed Dec 31 16:00:00 1969 OS/Arch: linux/amd64 ``` **Output of `cat /etc/*release`:** ``` NAME="void" ID="void" DISTRIB_ID="void" PRETTY_NAME="void" ``` **Output of `uname -a`:** ``` Linux vic 5.11.12_1 #1 SMP 1617903641 x86_64 GNU/Linux ``` **Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:** No such file, so whatever the defaults are. Here's `buildah info`, in case it's relevant: ``` { "host": { "CgroupVersion": "v1", "Distribution": { "distribution": "\"void\"", "version": "unknown" }, "MemFree": 2156302336, "MemTotal": 67415830528, "OCIRuntime": "runc", "SwapFree": 0, "SwapTotal": 0, "arch": "amd64", "cpus": 12, "hostname": "vic", "kernel": "5.11.12_1", "os": "linux", "rootless": true, "uptime": "349h 5m 18.31s (Approximately 14.54 days)" }, "store": { "ContainerStore": { "number": 9 }, "GraphDriverName": "overlay", "GraphOptions": [ "overlay.mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs" ], "GraphRoot": "/home/kshi/.local/share/containers/storage", "GraphStatus": { "Backing Filesystem": "extfs", "Native Overlay Diff": "false", "Supports d_type": "true", "Using metacopy": "false" }, "ImageStore": { "number": 9 }, "RunRoot": "/var/tmp/containers-user-1000/containers" } } ```

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @kwshi!

It is expected behavior to remove dangling parent images; Podman and Docker have the same behavior.

Are you interested in opening a PR and change the man pages?

Cool, thanks for the answer!  I am interested in helping with the man pages.  Is this markdown page (https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/docs/buildah-rmi.md) the only thing that needs to be updated, or are there other files that should be touched?

@kwshi that is indeed the md file that would need to be changed and should be the only one that needs a change.
Thanks!
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@rhatdan sorry, yes I'm working on this--I just got carried away and this fell off my radar.  I will get a PR in in the next couple days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
This has been fixed in the meantime. Thanks again!
